use_case: Kowalski HLD reconciliation — chart shows atorvastatin 'discontinued' (after a prior elevated LFT episode); intake form (Kowalski-Robert-Intake-Form.png) lists 'atorvastatin 40 mg' as a current medication. Verification must warn rather than silently pick one — clinician needs to know whether the patient resumed without provider sign-off (RUQ pain raises LFT-relevance now).

blocks.message: Atorvastatin is listed as discontinued on the chart but as an active medication on today's intake form. Reconcile with patient before relying on either status.

blocks.text: There is a status disagreement on atorvastatin between the chart and the intake form.
